html:
Exclusive to:  

“Adds missing information to your Scrapbook”

-

The Scrapbook Page is an item rarely found in Don't Starve Together. With it, 3-4 random items, food, creature or giant will be added to the player's Scrapbook. A thing that has been studied will display connections with other things, but not its characteristics.
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Lost Scrapbook Page
Object Info
15 sec.
Can be Burned
40
Source
Dropped by
(10%, only non-player)
Miscellaneous
"scrapbook_page"
“Someone else out there likes to scrapbook.”
–Wilson
“Another page for the emergency kindling supply- I mean scrapbook.”
–Willow
“Is page of funny scribbles.”
–Wolfgang
“A lost and lonely page.”
–Wendy
“I WILL ADD THIS INFORMATION TO MY PAPER DATA RECEPTACLE”
–WX-78
“What a hideous sight! A page torn from its book!”
–Wickerbottom
“Huh. Wonder where it came from?”
–Woodie
“Curious. It may yield some useful information.”
–Maxwell
“Fröm whence hath yöu cöme, mysteriöus page?”
–Wigfrid
“Oooh, we found a page!”
–Webber
“Ah! Someone has left a page here.”
–Warly
“Book leaf?”
–Wormwood
“Let's see if there's anything interesting written on it.”
–Winona
“Where is it from? Not knowing is half the fun!”
–Wortox
“Found page for scrappy book!”
–Wurt
“I should add it to my scrapbook!”
–Walter
“Did I leave this here?”
–Wanda
“Adds missing information to your Scrapbook”
-
The Scrapbook Page is an item rarely found in Don't Starve Together. With it, 3-4 random items, food, creature or giant will be added to the player's Scrapbook. A thing that has been studied will display connections with other things, but not its characteristics.

Resources
Attention: The following categories are only for the players look up the page based on their first impression, they have nothing to do with the actual categories/behavior/function/tags of these items

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trang Scrapbook là một vật phẩm hiếm thấy trong Don't Starve Together. Với nó, 3-4 vật phẩm ngẫu nhiên, thức ăn, sinh vật hoặc người khổng lồ sẽ được thêm vào Scrapbook của người chơi. Một vật đã được nghiên cứu sẽ hiển thị các mối liên hệ với những vật khác, nhưng không hiển thị các đặc điểm của nó.
